languages.text: "Я так цеплялся за идею того, что его можно спасти, что не заметил, что спасать уже нечего. Нунциус, которого я знал, погиб на этом самом месте полвека назад. Но ведь хладные останки — это не все, что остается после человека. Память. {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Империум{/g} построен на памяти. Памяти о павших. О технологических заветах тех, кто был до нас. О великой жертве Бога-Императора, что ведет нас сквозь тьму беспощадного космоса". {n}Эоганн долго смотрит на Нунциуса сквозь марево стазиса.{/n} "Я дарую ему Милость Императора, а после воздам почести, как это должно сделать служителю Омниссии".

traits.locale_text: "Я так цеплялся за идею того, что его можно спасти, что не заметил, что спасать уже нечего. Нунциус, которого я знал, погиб на этом самом месте полвека назад. Но ведь хладные останки — это не все, что остается после человека. Память. {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Империум{/g} построен на памяти. Памяти о павших. О великой жертве Бога-Императора, что ведет нас сквозь тьму беспощадного космоса". {n}Эоганн долго смотрит на Нунциуса сквозь марево стазиса.{/n} "Я дарую ему Милость Императора, а после воздам почести, как это должно сделать служителю Омниссии".
traits.speaker: EogannCompanion

languages.text: "I was so fixated on the idea that he could be saved that I failed to notice that there was nothing left to save. The Nuncius I knew died on this very spot half a century ago. But cold remains are not all that a person leaves behind. Memory. The {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g} is built on memory. The memory of the fallen. Of the technological covenants of those who came before us. Of the great sacrifice of the God-Emperor, who guides us through the darkness of unforgiving space." {n}Eogunn takes a long look at Nuncius through the blur of the stasis seal.{/n} "I will grant him the Emperor's Mercy, and afterward I will honour him as is his due as a servant of the Omnissiah."
languages.original_text: "Я так цеплялся за идею того, что его можно спасти, что не заметил, что спасать уже нечего. Нунциус, которого я знал, погиб на этом самом месте полвека назад. О великой жертве Бога-Императора, что ведет нас сквозь тьму беспощадного космоса". {n}Эоганн долго смотрит на Нунциуса сквозь марево стазиса.{/n} "Я дарую ему Милость Императора, а после воздам почести, как это должно сделать служителю Омниссии".

Of the technological covenants of those who came before us. Of the great sacrifice of the God-Emperor, who guides us through the darkness of unforgiving space." {n}Eogunn takes a long look at Nuncius through the blur of the stasis seal.{/n} "I will grant him the Emperor's Peace, and afterward I will honour him as is his due as a servant of the Omnissiah."

Of the great sacrifice of the God-Emperor, who guides us through the darkness of unforgiving space." {n}Eogunn takes a long look at Nuncius through the blur of the stasis seal.{/n} "I will grant him the Emperor's Peace, and afterward I will honour him as is his due as a servant of the Omnissiah."

languages.text: «Me obsesionaba tanto la idea de salvarlo que no me di cuenta de que ya no quedaba nada que salvar. El Nuncius que conocía murió allí mismo, hace ya medio siglo. Pero un cadáver frío no es lo único que una persona deja atrás. Su memoria. El {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g} se erige sobre los recuerdos. El recuerdo de los caídos. De los prodigios tecnológicos de quienes nos precedieron. Del gran sacrificio del Dios Emperador, que nos guía a través de la inclemente negrura del espacio». {n}Eogunn mira detenidamente a Nuncius a través de la borrosa superficie del sello de estasis.{/n} «Le concederé la Piedad del Emperador, y después le honraré como merece un siervo fiel del Omnissiah».
languages.original_text: "I was so fixated on the idea that he could be saved that I failed to notice that there was nothing left to save. The Nuncius I knew died on this very spot half a century ago. But cold remains are not all that a person leaves behind. Memory. The {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g} is built on memory. The memory of the fallen. Of the technological covenants of those who came before us. Of the great sacrifice of the God-Emperor, who guides us through the darkness of unforgiving space." {n}Eogunn takes a long look at Nuncius through the blur of the stasis seal.{/n} "I will grant him the Emperor's Mercy, and afterward I will honour him as is his due as a servant of the Omnissiah."

«Me obsesionaba tanto la idea de salvarlo que no me di cuenta de que ya no quedaba nada que salvar. El Nuncius que conocía murió allí mismo, hace ya medio siglo. Pero un cadáver frío no es lo único que una persona deja atrás. Su memoria. El {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g} se erige sobre los recuerdos. El recuerdo de los caídos. De los prodigios tecnológicos de quienes nos precedieron. Del gran sacrificio del Dios Emperador, que nos guía a través de la inclemente negrura del espacio». {n}Eogunn mira detenidamente a Nuncius a través de la borrosa superficie del sello de estasis.{/n} «Le concederé la Paz del Emperador, y después le honraré como merece un siervo fiel del Omnissiah».

languages.text: “我太执着于‘他可以得救’这个念头，以至于没有看清一切早已无可挽回。我认识的那个努恩修斯，五十年前就死在这里了。但一个人留下的远不止冰冷的遗骸，还有记忆。{g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}帝国{/g}正是建立在记忆之上，对逝者的记忆，对先贤技术圣约的记忆，对神皇伟大牺牲的记忆。正是祂，引领我们穿越这片残酷黑暗的宇宙。”{n}伊奥贡透过静滞力场模糊的密封罩，久久地凝视着努恩修斯。{/n}“我将赐予他帝皇的慈悲，随后，以他作为欧姆尼塞亚仆人所应得之礼遇，纪念他。”
languages.original_text: "I was so fixated on the idea that he could be saved that I failed to notice that there was nothing left to save. The Nuncius I knew died on this very spot half a century ago. But cold remains are not all that a person leaves behind. Memory. The {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g} is built on memory. The memory of the fallen. Of the technological covenants of those who came before us. Of the great sacrifice of the God-Emperor, who guides us through the darkness of unforgiving space." {n}Eogunn takes a long look at Nuncius through the blur of the stasis seal.{/n} "I will grant him the Emperor's Mercy, and afterward I will honour him as is his due as a servant of the Omnissiah."

languages.text: « J'étais certain de pouvoir le sauver, tellement aveuglé par cette conviction que je n'ai pas remarqué qu'il n'y avait plus rien à sauver. Le Nuncius que je connaissais a péri ici même il y a un demi-siècle. Mais outre leur corps, les morts laissent autre chose derrière eux : leur souvenir. L'{g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g} est bâti sur le souvenir, celui de ses serviteurs qui sont tombés pour lui, des conventions technologiques établies par nos prédécesseurs, du grand sacrifice de l'Empereur-Dieu, qui nous guide à travers les ténèbres impitoyables de l'espace. » {n}Eogunn regarde longuement Nuncius à travers le sceau de stase qui brouille son image.{/n} « Je vais lui accorder la miséricorde de l'Empereur, puis je lui rendrai hommage comme il le mérite en sa qualité de serviteur de l'Omnimessie. »
languages.original_text: "I was so fixated on the idea that he could be saved that I failed to notice that there was nothing left to save. The Nuncius I knew died on this very spot half a century ago. But cold remains are not all that a person leaves behind. Memory. The {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g} is built on memory. The memory of the fallen. Of the technological covenants of those who came before us. Of the great sacrifice of the God-Emperor, who guides us through the darkness of unforgiving space." {n}Eogunn takes a long look at Nuncius through the blur of the stasis seal.{/n} "I will grant him the Emperor's Mercy, and afterward I will honour him as is his due as a servant of the Omnissiah."

L'{g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g} est bâti sur le souvenir, celui de ses serviteurs qui sont tombés pour lui, des conventions technologiques établies par nos prédécesseurs, du grand sacrifice de l'Empereur-Dieu, qui nous guide à travers les ténèbres impitoyables de l'espace. » {n}Eogunn regarde longuement Nuncius à travers le sceau de stase qui brouille son image.{/n} « Je vais lui accorder la miséricorde de l'Empereur, puis je lui rendrai hommage comme il le mérite en sa qualité de serviteur de l'Omnimessie. »

« J'étais certain de pouvoir le sauver, tellement aveuglé par cette conviction que je n'ai pas remarqué qu'il n'y avait plus rien à sauver. Le Nuncius que je connaissais a péri ici même il y a un demi-siècle. Mais outre leur corps, les morts laissent autre chose derrière eux : leur souvenir. L'{g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g} est bâti sur le souvenir, celui de ses serviteurs qui sont tombés pour lui, des conventions technologiques établies par nos prédécesseurs, du grand sacrifice de l'Empereur-Dieu, qui nous guide à travers les ténèbres impitoyables de l'espace. » {n}Eogunn regarde longuement Nuncius à travers le sceau de stase qui brouille son image.{/n} « Je vais lui accorder la paix de l'Empereur, puis je lui rendrai hommage comme il le mérite en sa qualité de serviteur de l'Omnimessie. »

languages.text: "Kurtarılabileceği fikrine o kadar saplanıp kalmıştım ki kurtarılacak hiçbir şey kalmadığını fark edemedim. Tanıdığım Nuncius elli yıl önce tam bu noktada öldü. Fakat soğuk kalıntılar, insanın geride bıraktığı tek şey değildir. Hafıza. {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}İmparatorluk{/g}, hafıza üzerine kuruludur. Yitenlerin anısı. Bizden öncekilerin teknolojik ahitleri. Bizi affetmeyen uzayın karanlığında yönlendiren Tanrı İmparator'un büyük fedakârlığı." {n}Eogunn, staz mührünün bulanıklığı üzerinden Nuncius'a uzun uzun bakıyor.{/n} "Ona İmparator'un Merhameti'ni bahşedeceğim ve sonrasında Hermesih'in hizmetkârı olarak hak ettiği gibi onu onurlandıracağım."
languages.original_text: "I was so fixated on the idea that he could be saved that I failed to notice that there was nothing left to save. The Nuncius I knew died on this very spot half a century ago. But cold remains are not all that a person leaves behind. Memory. The {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g} is built on memory. The memory of the fallen. Of the technological covenants of those who came before us. Of the great sacrifice of the God-Emperor, who guides us through the darkness of unforgiving space." {n}Eogunn takes a long look at Nuncius through the blur of the stasis seal.{/n} "I will grant him the Emperor's Mercy, and afterward I will honour him as is his due as a servant of the Omnissiah."

Fakat soğuk kalıntılar, insanın geride bıraktığı tek şey değildir. Hafıza. {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}İmparatorluk{/g}, hafıza üzerine kuruludur. Yitenlerin anısı. Bizden öncekilerin teknolojik ahitleri. Bizi affetmeyen uzayın karanlığında yönlendiren Tanrı İmparator'un büyük fedakârlığı." {n}Eogunn, staz mührünün bulanıklığı üzerinden Nuncius'a uzun uzun bakıyor.{/n} "Ona İmparator'un Merhameti'ni bahşedeceğim ve sonrasında Hermesih'in hizmetkârı olarak hak ettiği gibi onu onurlandıracağım."

"Kurtarılabileceği fikrine o kadar saplanıp kalmıştım ki kurtarılacak hiçbir şey kalmadığını fark edemedim. Tanıdığım Nuncius elli yıl önce tam bu noktada öldü. Fakat soğuk kalıntılar, insanın geride bıraktığı tek şey değildir. Hafıza. {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}İmparatorluk{/g}, hafıza üzerine kuruludur. Yitenlerin anısı. Bizden öncekilerin teknolojik ahitleri. Bizi affetmeyen uzayın karanlığında yönlendiren Tanrı İmparator'un büyük fedakârlığı." {n}Eogunn, staz mührünün bulanıklığı üzerinden Nuncius'a uzun uzun bakıyor.{/n} "Ona İmparator'un Huzuru'nu bahşedeceğim ve sonrasında Hermesih'in hizmetkârı olarak hak ettiği gibi onu onurlandıracağım."

languages.text: "Ich war so von der Idee besessen, ihn retten zu können, dass ich nicht bemerkte, dass es längst nichts mehr zu retten gab. Der Nuncius, den ich kannte, starb genau hier ... vor einem halben Jahrhundert. Aber kalte Überreste sind nicht alles, was von einer Person bleibt. Erinnerungen. Das {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g} basiert auf Erinnerungen. Den Erinnerungen an die Gefallenen. Den technologischen Pakten unserer Vorfahren. Auf dem großen Opfer des Gottimperators, der uns durch die Dunkelheit des unbarmherzigen Weltraums führt." {n}Eogunn wirft durch die Trübung des Stasesiegels einen langen Blick auf Nuncius.{/n} "Ich werde ihm die Gnade des Imperators gewähren und ihn anschließend als Diener des Omnissiah ehren."
languages.original_text: "I was so fixated on the idea that he could be saved that I failed to notice that there was nothing left to save. The Nuncius I knew died on this very spot half a century ago. But cold remains are not all that a person leaves behind. Memory. The {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g} is built on memory. The memory of the fallen. Of the technological covenants of those who came before us. Of the great sacrifice of the God-Emperor, who guides us through the darkness of unforgiving space." {n}Eogunn takes a long look at Nuncius through the blur of the stasis seal.{/n} "I will grant him the Emperor's Mercy, and afterward I will honour him as is his due as a servant of the Omnissiah."

traits.locale_text: "Ich war so von der Idee besessen, ihn retten zu können, dass ich nicht bemerkte, dass es längst nichts mehr zu retten gab. Der Nuncius, den ich kannte, starb genau hier ... vor einem halben Jahrhundert. Aber kalte Überreste sind nicht alles, was von einer Person bleibt. Erinnerungen. Das {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g} basiert auf Erinnerungen. Den Erinnerungen an die Gefallenen. Den technologischen Pakten unserer Vorfahren. Auf dem großen Opfer des Gottimperators, der uns durch die Dunkelheit des unbarmherzigen Weltraums führt." {n}Eogunn wirft durch die Trübung des Stasesiegels einen langen Blick auf Nuncius.{/n} "Ich werde ihm die Gnade des Imperators gewähren und ihn anschließend als Diener des Omnissiah ehren."

"Ich war so von der Idee besessen, ihn retten zu können, dass ich nicht bemerkte, dass es längst nichts mehr zu retten gab. Der Nuncius, den ich kannte, starb genau hier ... vor einem halben Jahrhundert. Aber kalte Überreste sind nicht alles, was von einer Person bleibt. Erinnerungen. Das {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g} basiert auf Erinnerungen. Auf den Erinnerungen der Gefallenen. Den technologischen Pakten unserer Vorfahren. Auf dem großen Opfer des Gottimperators, der uns durch die Dunkelheit des unbarmherzigen Weltraums führt." {n}Eogunn wirft durch die Trübung des Stasesiegels einen langen Blick auf Nuncius.{/n} "Ich werde ihm den Frieden des Imperators gewähren und ihn anschließend als Diener des Omnissiah ehren."

languages.text: 「私は、彼を救えるという考えに取り憑かれるあまり、もはや救うべきものなど何も残っていないことに気づけずにいました。私の知るヌンキウスは、半世紀前、まさにこの場所で死んだのです。しかし、冷たい亡骸だけが、人の遺すものではありません。記憶です。{g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}帝国{/g}は記憶の上に築かれています。斃れた者たちの記憶。我々に先んじた者たちの技術的聖約の記憶。そして、容赦なき宇宙の闇を越えて我々を導きたもう、神帝陛下の偉大なる犠牲の記憶の上に」{n}エオガンは、ステイシス封印のかすみ越しに、ヌンキウスを長く見つめる。{/n}「私は彼に皇帝の安息を与え、その後、オムニッシアの僕としてふさわしい栄誉をもって、彼を悼みます」
languages.original_text: "I was so fixated on the idea that he could be saved that I failed to notice that there was nothing left to save. The Nuncius I knew died on this very spot half a century ago. But cold remains are not all that a person leaves behind. Memory. The {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g} is built on memory. The memory of the fallen. Of the technological covenants of those who came before us. Of the great sacrifice of the God-Emperor, who guides us through the darkness of unforgiving space." {n}Eogunn takes a long look at Nuncius through the blur of the stasis seal.{/n} "I will grant him the Emperor's Peace, and afterward I will honour him as is his due as a servant of the Omnissiah."
